message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Admin" as Admin
participant ":RemoveScooterUI" as UI
participant ":RemoveScooterScooterController" as Controller
participant "pharmServ\n:PharmacyService" as PharmService
participant "pharmDB\n:PharmacyDB" as PharmDB
participant "scootServ\n:ScooterService" as ScootService
participant "scootDB\n:ScooterDB" as ScootDB

Admin -> UI : 1 Sends a request regarding the update of an electric scooter's data
activate UI
UI -> Controller : 2 showPharmacies()
activate Controller
Controller -> PharmService : 3 create()
activate PharmService
PharmService -> PharmDB : 4 create()
activate PharmDB
PharmDB --> PharmService : 5 lstPharmacies = getPharmacies()
deactivate PharmDB
PharmService --> Controller : 6 lstPharmacies = getPharmacies()
deactivate PharmService
ref right of PharmDB : SD_CONNECTIONS
Controller --> UI : 7 Shows the list of pharmacies and asks to choose one
deactivate Controller
deactivate UI
Admin -> UI : 8 Chooses the pharmacy
activate UI
UI -> Controller : 9 showScooterList(pharmacyId)
activate Controller
Controller -> ScootService : 10 create()
activate ScootService
ScootService -> ScootDB : 11 create()
activate ScootDB
ScootDB --> ScootService : 12 lstScooters = getScootersList(pharmacyId)
deactivate ScootDB
ScootService --> Controller : 13 lstScooters = getScootersList(pharmacyId)
deactivate ScootService
ref right of ScootDB : SD_CONNECTIONS
Controller --> UI : 14 Shows the list of eletric scooters and asks to choose one
deactivate Controller
deactivate UI
Admin -> UI : 15 Chooses the eletric scooter
activate UI
UI --> Admin : 16 Shows the information about the scooter, asking to update
deactivate UI
Admin -> UI : 17 Updates the information
activate UI
UI -> Controller : 18 updateScooter(batteryPerc, chargingStatus,\npotency, weight, batteryCapacity, maxPayload, pharmacyId)
activate Controller
Controller -> ScootService : 19 updateScooter(batteryPerc, chargingStatus,\npotency, weight, batteryCapacity, maxPayload, pharmacyId)
activate ScootService
ScootService -> ScootDB : 20 updateScooterFromDB(batteryPerc, chargingStatus,\npotency, weight, batteryCapacity, maxPayload, pharmacyId)
activate ScootDB
ref right of ScootDB : SD_Connections
deactivate ScootDB
deactivate ScootService
deactivate Controller
deactivate UI
UI --> Admin : 21 Validates all the information, informing of the success of the operation

@enduml
```
